evidence: "Excellent faith-based, i.e. Christian, flick dealing with defending God's Word..."
"Love this set of Christmas movies, watch them sometimes even during the year to keep the spirit up."
"A really good 'feel' movie and Sorbo is excellent as usual..."
"Not great acting but worth a watch."
"Be warned, this takes a lot of concentration and patience to view: rather boring in many parts..."
"It gets pretty interesting towards the end, though."
"Not great acting but worth a watch."
"United are one of the best Christian worship groups today."
"God's love pours through Louie and his sermons with great graphics."
"A story about 'what if' I had done things differently..."
"A wonderful movie with Jefferson Moore... full of life and life changes..."
"Highly recommended for the Christmas season or any season."

summary: The user has a strong preference for Christian and Christmas-themed content, often appreciating simple narratives with emotional depth. They enjoy films that evoke a sense of warmth and connection, though they show less concern for high production quality.
